benefits.title: Targeted allocation
benefits.description: Move teams and supplies using actual district-level need instead of assumptions.

benefits.title: Faster response
benefits.description: Fresh reports and donations update the same operating picture used by coordinators.

benefits.title: Measurable planning
benefits.description: Coverage, gaps, and recent actions stay visible for every region in one place.

sources.name: Paper Surveys
sources.description: Field worker paper forms digitized into the shared hub.

sources.name: Excel Sheets
sources.description: Legacy spreadsheets consolidated from partner NGOs.

sources.name: Mobile App Data
sources.description: Volunteer check-ins collected from mobile outreach visits.

sources.name: Health Center Reports
sources.description: Clinic and community health updates from district partners.

sources.name: School Data
sources.description: Education and child welfare needs reported by schools.

sources.name: Government Surveys
sources.description: District survey snapshots shared by public agencies.

regions.name: Mumbai
regions.focus: Water access, medical support, and dense community outreach.

regions.name: Thane
regions.focus: Shelter support, health camp staffing, and flood preparedness.

regions.name: Pune
regions.focus: Education continuity, family ration kits, and senior care visits.

regions.name: Nagpur
regions.focus: Nutrition kits, adolescent health outreach, and local transport.

regions.name: Nashik
regions.focus: Water logistics, anganwadi support, and school meal coverage.

regions.name: Aurangabad
regions.focus: Monitor emerging needs and maintain standby volunteer readiness.

activities.title: Team deployed to Mumbai
activities.detail: 16 volunteers assigned. No extra deployment note.

activities.title: District records consolidated
activities.detail: Six source streams were merged into one planning interface for coordinators.

activities.title: Priority heatmap refreshed
activities.detail: Mumbai and Thane stayed on top after the latest district review.

activities.title: Volunteer plan reviewed
activities.detail: Deployment shortlist prepared for Mumbai, Thane, and Pune first.
